Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class MessagingChannel

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.MessagingChannel
public class MessagingChannel extends SObject

Java class for MessagingChannel complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="MessagingChannel">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="BusinessHours" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}BusinessHours" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="BusinessHoursId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ConsentType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ConversationEndResponse" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Description" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DeveloperName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DoubleOptInPrompt" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EngagedResponse" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="InitialResponse" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsActive" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsDeleted" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsLinkedRecordOpenedAsSubTab" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsRequireDoubleOptIn" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsRestrictedToBusinessHours" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsoCountryCode" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Language" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LinkingPreference" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="MasterLabel" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="MessageType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="MessagingLinks" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="MessagingPlatformKey" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="MsgChannelLanguageKeywords" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OfflineAgentsResponse" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OptInPrompt" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OutsideBusinessHoursResponse" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RoutingType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SystemModstamp" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TargetQueue" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}Group" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TargetQueueId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
